mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product( product_name, price, stock, status )VALUES( #{productName}, #{price}, #{stock}, #{status} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, product_name, price, stock, status, create_time, update_time FROM product ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT id, product_name, price, stock, status, create_time, update_time FROM product WHERE id =#{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE product SET product_name = #{productName}, price = #{price}, stock = #{stock}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
